data.title: Horizon Minerals rebrands as Maritana Minerals with new ASX code MRT
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Horizon Minerals Ltd ( (AU:HRZ) ) has shared an announcement.

Maritana Minerals Limited, previously known as Horizon Minerals Limited, has rebranded following shareholder approval, adopting a new corporate name while retaining its existing registered office, principal place of business and Australian Business Number. The miner’s securities will begin trading under the new ASX ticker MRT from 13 April 2026, signaling a fresh phase of growth and market positioning under the updated brand without altering its underlying operations.

The change of name and code underscores the board’s push to refresh the company’s identity as it enters its next stage of development, a move likely aimed at sharpening its profile with investors in the competitive Australian resources sector. With core operational details unchanged, stakeholders can expect continuity in day‑to‑day activities, while the branding shift may help differentiate the company and support future capital markets engagement.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:HRZ) stock is a Hold with a A$0.84 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Horizon Minerals Ltd stock, see the AU:HRZ Stock Forecast page.

More about Horizon Minerals Ltd

Maritana Minerals Limited, formerly Horizon Minerals Limited, operates in the minerals and mining sector and is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange. The company focuses on resource exploration and development in Western Australia, maintaining its existing business locations and corporate identifiers aside from its new trading name and ticker code.

Average Trading Volume: 1,392,831

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$246.4M

Yield Go Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:1796) ) has provided an announcement.

Metaspacex Limited has requested a halt in trading of its shares on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong, effective from 9:00 a.m. on April 10, 2026. The suspension comes as the company prepares to issue an announcement regarding a reduction in the controlling shareholder’s stake, which has been classified as inside information and may signal a shift in ownership dynamics and governance considerations for investors.

The company has not yet disclosed detailed terms or reasons behind the controlling shareholder’s planned divestment, leaving the market awaiting clarity on potential changes in influence or strategic direction. The trading halt aims to ensure an orderly market and equal access to material information once the announcement is released, reflecting regulatory focus on transparency and investor protection in Hong Kong’s equity markets.

Metaspacex Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands with its shares listed on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong under stock code 1796. The board comprises three executive directors, including chief executive officer Kang Ruipeng, and three independent non-executive directors based in Hong Kong.

Magellan Financial Group Ltd ( (AU:MFG) ) has issued an announcement.

Magellan Financial Group director Deborah Page has increased her direct and indirect holding in the company through participation in a share purchase plan. She acquired 622 additional ordinary fully paid shares in Magellan at $8.45 per share, lifting her total holding to 6,822 company shares alongside existing units in various Magellan funds.

The transaction, executed on 1 April 2026 and disclosed to the ASX, signals continued alignment of the director’s interests with those of shareholders. The purchase was conducted outside a closed period and did not involve any change to her interests in contracts, suggesting a straightforward capital deployment into Magellan equity rather than any restructuring of related financial arrangements.

data.title: Sanyo Trading to Acquire Kitakyu Sensui, Expanding Marine and Offshore Wind Business
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sanyo Trading Co., Ltd. ( (JP:3176) ) just unveiled an update.

Sanyo Trading Co., Ltd. has decided to acquire all shares of Kitakyu Sensui Co., Ltd., a Kyushu-based provider of commercial diving services and related equipment, turning it into a wholly owned subsidiary. Kitakyu Sensui brings more than 40 years of experience in oceanographic surveys, inspections, construction work and sales of diving equipment and high-pressure compressors, with steady revenues and profits.

By integrating Kitakyu Sensui, which will first absorb the Kyushu Diving Center business operated by its founder, Sanyo Trading aims to expand its ocean-related value chain and provide combined solutions spanning materials, equipment and underwater services. The deal is also intended to support the company’s push into offshore wind power generation-related business, reinforcing its long-term growth strategy and positioning in marine infrastructure and renewable energy markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:3176) stock is a Buy with a Yen1992.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sanyo Trading Co., Ltd. stock, see the JP:3176 Stock Forecast page.

More about Sanyo Trading Co., Ltd.

Sanyo Trading Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based trading company listed on the TSE Prime Market, focusing on materials, equipment and solution-based services across industrial segments. The group is pursuing a long-term growth strategy under its Sanyo Vision 2028 plan, emphasizing the nurturing of core businesses, mergers and acquisitions, and strategic investments to broaden its value chain and enhance its presence in specialized markets such as ocean-related industries and renewable energy.

data.title: Shanghai Zhida H Shares Added to Hang Seng Composite and Stock Connect Trading Links
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Shanghai Zhida Technology Development Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2650) ) is now available.

Shanghai Zhida Technology Development Co., Ltd. announced that its H shares have been selected as a constituent of the Hang Seng Composite Index, effective 9 March 2026, reflecting heightened market recognition of the company’s performance and value. The H shares will also become eligible for Southbound Trading under both the Shenzhen-Hong Kong and Shanghai-Hong Kong Stock Connect schemes from 10 April 2026, enabling mainland Chinese investors to directly trade the company’s Hong Kong-listed shares.

Management expects these inclusions to broaden Shanghai Zhida’s investor base, particularly among mainland institutional and retail participants, and to support higher trading liquidity in its H shares. The moves further integrate the company into key benchmark and cross-border trading frameworks, potentially improving its visibility in the capital markets and reinforcing its positioning within the Hong Kong–Mainland equity connectivity ecosystem.

More about Shanghai Zhida Technology Development Co., Ltd. Class H

Shanghai Zhida Technology Development Co., Ltd. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China with limited liability and listed in Hong Kong as a Class H share issuer. It operates in the technology development sector, targeting capital markets access via its H shares on The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong to broaden its investor base and enhance trading liquidity.

data.description:

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Smartoptics Group AS ( (DE:3YL) ) is now available.

Smartoptics Group ASA, a Scandinavian optical networking specialist, focuses on open networking solutions that help customers avoid vendor lock-in while supporting metro and regional networks tied to data center services. The company serves a diversified global customer base through partnerships with major technology vendors and an extensive network of business partners.

The company’s 2025 results showed revenue rising 35.6% to USD 75.3 million, with EBITDA improving to USD 9.7 million and margins expanding at both EBITDA and EBIT levels. Management described 2025 as a transformative year marked by strong growth, better profitability and key strategic milestones, including an uplisting to the main market of Euronext Oslo Børs, which enhances capital markets visibility and underpins future growth ambitions in the fast-evolving optical networking market.

More about Smartoptics Group AS

Smartoptics Group ASA is a Scandinavian provider of innovative optical networking solutions and devices for open networking environments. Its products serve metro and regional network applications, targeting enterprises, governments, cloud providers, internet exchanges, and cable and telecom operators seeking flexible, cost-efficient data center connectivity.
